description:
Update the nvf flake input to the latest version. This may resolve:

- treesitter-textobjects compatibility (nix-czo.6 is disabled due to
  `nvim-treesitter.config` module not found error)
- `vim.extensions.render-markdown-nvim` native support (currently using
  `lazy.plugins` workaround)

After updating, check if treesitter-textobjects can be re-enabled
(`home-modules/editors/neovim/editing/treesitter-textobjects.nix`).
title: Update nvf to latest version
